title: Hampshire College announces closure effective this fall | New England Public Media
description: The small, liberal arts college in Amherst was founded in 1965 and has been facing financial pressures in recent years.

summaryHistory.summary: “The financial realities we face: declining enrollment, the weight of long-standing debt, and stalled progress on land development left us no other responsible path.”The news comes as the New England Commission of Higher Education demanded the college prove that it should keep its accreditation.“...
